## Implementation

Verified existing comprehensive unit test suite for dependency_evaluator.py. Test file contains 49 test cases organized in 11 test classes covering: external ID resolution, missing resolver configuration, non-int handle resolution, cross-repository dependencies, blocked issue identification, state change handling, event emission, dependency parsing edge cases, display references, report summaries, and cross-milestone validation. All 49 tests pass with 100% code coverage of the 89 statements in dependency_evaluator.py.
